decisions.question: How should the Reporter be injected into internal/install/ (Manager, library, bootstrap)?
decisions.chosen: Struct field + SetReporter() on Manager, mirroring the executor pattern

decisions.question: Output classification per category (Status vs Log vs DeferWarn vs silence)?
decisions.chosen: Orchestration labels/action sub-steps → Status(); verify top-level → Log(); completions/library notices → silence; PATH guidance → DeferWarn()

decisions.question: Verify output during install: show all sub-steps, suppress, or failure-only?
decisions.chosen: Suppress sub-steps via Verbose:false; failure detail already self-contained in error chain

decisions.question: Which action reporter.Log() calls become Status() or silence?
decisions.chosen: Per-file loop lines removed; extraction/command-in-progress → Status(); milestones/cache/retry/command-output → Log()
